channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Before dipping into your 401(k) for emergency cash, consider these costs
item.description: Here’s what you need to know before taking money from your 401(k) or getting a 401(k) loan

item.title: Why ServiceNow’s stock is sliding in the wake of earnings
item.description: Investors may be taking issue with various elements of the software company’s margin forecast.

item.title: A market pullback is more likely than a continued rally, Goldman Sachs says
item.description: Goldman’s warning comes as the stock market has enjoyed a strong rally off the lows hit on March 30.

item.title: Analysts try to quell market panic after Taiwan Semiconductor said ASML charges too much
item.description: There aren’t many customers for ASML’s multi-million-dollar machines, and one of them just drew a line in the sand.

item.title: Texas Instruments topped Wall Street’s outlook on more than just data-center demand

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
